classes.purpose: Understand the case and write a source-backed Deep Research prompt
classes.content: The question and facts typed or attached by the user, including names or other personal facts when material; inferred research framing; optimized prompt; source-domain sidecars; diagnostics and review decisions

boundaries_beyond_codex.purpose: Curate qualified source domains for the confirmed legal framework and issue
boundaries_beyond_codex.content: Legal or tax issue research terms and public-source URLs; queries can reflect case facts when Codex uses them
controls: Codex selects domains from the confirmed framework; deterministic scripts do not choose legal sources.
The workflow does not request credentials or authenticated-source access.

security_controls.control: The workflow does not claim to remove or anonymize text that the user already placed in Codex context.
Helper scripts inspect, validate, and package files locally and do not call model APIs.
The workflow produces a prompt package; it does not automatically submit the prompt to Deep Research.
